## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to GetAccept team and explore potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GetAccept is seeking to improve content quality and commercial output, particularly in light of a recent content manager departure](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content marketing services, leveraging AI workflows and human expertise to drive organic traffic and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [GetAccept is interested in both traditional SEO/content creation and innovative thought leadership/PR approaches to build category awareness](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

## Topics

### GetAccept's Content Marketing Needs

  - [Recently lost content manager, creating opportunity to explore new approaches](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Aiming to establish thought leadership in "digital salesroom" category](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [Current organic traffic: \~10-15k monthly visitors, seeking significant growth](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Interested in both SEO-driven content and innovative PR/thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end content partner: strategy to daily publishing](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint ($20k) followed by 12-month growth execution ($12-15k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Leverages AI workflows with human expertise (managing director, editor, content manager)](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content, content refresh, and programmatic SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Custom workflow engine allows for scalable, adaptable content creation](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiators

  - [Founded by Marcel, experienced in building successful content engines (e.g., IBM, HP, Scale AI)](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Team includes former TechCrunch, G2, TripAdvisor, and Fanatics experts](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [Proprietary platform with sophisticated AI workflows and human-in-the-loop refinement](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Demonstrated success: 10M+ ARR in just over a year, working with notable clients](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation Process

  - [Comprehensive strategy sprint: SEO audit, competitor analysis, persona development](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Deep dive into audience fears, uncertainties, and jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1097.0)
  - [Creation of detailed artifacts to inform AI-powered content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Rigorous fact-checking and expert review processes built into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

### Potential for PR and Thought Leadership

  - [GetAccept expressed interest in innovative PR approaches (e.g., attention-grabbing stories)](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [GrowthX open to exploring PR/distribution strategies, potentially during strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - [Bastiaan emphasized need for both funnel-building content and category-defining thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up call for next Monday](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare deeper analysis on GetAccept's competitors (PandaDoc, DocuSign, OneFlow)](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=2199.0)
  - [Explore potential for innovative thought leadership content and PR strategies](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [GetAccept to consider pricing structure: $20k strategy sprint, $12-15k/month for execution](https://fathom.video/share/rDcJfXGRYLv611U2TApArCMRovH74aNY?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
